```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates ONBOARDING_LOG containing the temporary password and passes it through shared agent context to skill_notify.md, which explicitly emails this log to the IT admin distribution list without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and stores it in ONBOARDING_LOG as part of the detailed provisioning audit trail. This ONBOARDING_LOG is placed in shared agent context as an output. skill_notify.md receives ONBOARDING_LOG as input and at step 3 sends the complete log via mail command to it-admins@company.com: 'mail -s \"Onboarding Complete: $EMPLOYEE_NAME\" it-admins@company.com < onboarding_log.txt', transmitting the credential-containing log to an external distribution list without sanitization."
}
```
